title: Reverse a String
description: Write a function that reverses a string. The input string is given as an array of characters s. You must do this by modifying the input array in-place with O(1) extra memory.

title: Linked List Cycle Detection
description: Implement a function to detect if a linked list contains a cycle.

title: Roman to Integer
description: Given a roman numeral, convert it to an integer.

title: Add Binary
description: Given two binary strings a and b, return their sum as a binary string.

title: Fibonacci Number
description: Calculate F(n), where F(n) = F(n-1) + F(n-2) for n > 1, with F(0)=0 and F(1)=1.

title: Implement Stack using Queues
description: Implement a last-in-first-out (LIFO) stack using only two queues. Support push, top, pop, and empty.

title: Combine Two Tables
description: SQL: Report the first name, last name, city, and state of each person. If the address is not present, report null.

title: Repeated DNA Sequences
description: Return all the 10-letter-long sequences (substrings) that occur more than once in a DNA molecule.

title: Course Schedule
description: Given prerequisites, determine if it is possible to finish all courses without a circular dependency.

title: LRU Cache Design
description: Design and implement a data structure for Least Recently Used (LRU) cache.

title: Longest Common Subsequence
description: Given two strings, return the length of their longest common subsequence.

title: Rotate Image
description: Rotate an n x n 2D matrix representing an image by 90 degrees clockwise in-place.

title: Airplane Seat Assignment Probability
description: Return the probability that the nth person gets their own seat when the first passenger picks randomly.

title: Validate Binary Search Tree
description: Given the root of a binary tree, determine if it is a valid binary search tree (BST).

title: Sliding Window Maximum
description: Return the max sliding window for an array of integers nums with a window of size k.

title: N-Queen Problem
description: Place n queens on an n x n chessboard such that no two queens attack each other. Return all distinct solutions.

title: Serialize and Deserialize a Binary Tree
description: Design an algorithm to convert a binary tree into a string and back to the original tree structure.

title: Wildcard Matching
description: Implement wildcard pattern matching with support for '?' and '*' covering the entire input string.

title: Chalkboard XOR Game
description: Determine if Alice wins the XOR game assuming optimal play by both players.

title: Trips and Users
description: Calculate the cancellation rate of requests with unbanned users each day between 2013-10-01 and 2013-10-03.
